name: rust-browser-control
description: Full side-pane browser control for Codex Desktop on Linux through a local Rust MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Full shared side-pane browser control on Linux.
interface.longDescription: Control the current task's visible in-app browser through Codex's browser-use socket. Covers tabs, visible pointer and keyboard input, locators, waits, screenshots, uploads, downloads, page exports, assets, dialogs, clipboard, logs, responsive viewport testing, and guarded CDP without launching a separate browser profile.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Rust Browser Control to operate this task's visible side-pane browser safely.
